Ana Silva, MD, CRC

Clinical Research Coordinator at Stanford School of Medicine (PACCM). MD with a background in Family Medicine and a Post-Graduate in Health Data Science. Experienced in clinical trials management, regulatory compliance, and translational research.

Contact me

2026 © Ana Silva, MD, CRC

Publications & Scientific Work

2019, Nov 30    

The Silent Cognitive Burden of Chronic Pain: Protocol for an AI-Enhanced Living Dose–Response Bayesian Meta-Analysis

Ana Silva et al.

Journal of Clinical Medicine, October 2025

A protocol paper presenting an innovative AI-enhanced living meta-analysis framework applying Bayesian dose–response methods to investigate the cognitive burden of chronic pain.


Theta-band brain oscillatory patterns in chronic pain patients: A systematic review and meta-analysis

Ana Silva et al.

Submitted for publication

A systematic review and meta-analysis examining theta-band oscillatory patterns in the brains of chronic pain patients, contributing to the neurophysiological understanding of chronic pain.


Muscle pain in the elderly: two cases of polymyalgia rheumatica

Ana Silva

Medical Journal MGF & Ciência, December 2020

A clinical case report describing two cases of polymyalgia rheumatica in elderly patients, highlighting diagnostic and management considerations in primary care.


The importance of social determinants and health literacy

Ana Silva

Jornal Médico, January 2020 (Published online)

An article discussing the critical role of social determinants of health and health literacy in patient outcomes and healthcare delivery.


Prescription of Pneumococcal Vaccine to Diabetics in a USF: Evaluation Study and Continuous Quality Improvement

Ana Silva

II Jornadas USF Freamunde, October 2019 — Poster Presentation

Award: 1st Award, II Jornadas USF Freamunde

An evaluation study assessing pneumococcal vaccine prescription practices in diabetic patients at a primary care unit, with recommendations for continuous quality improvement.


The role of oral magnesium in pregnancy cramps: an evidence-based review

Ana Silva

Medical Journal AIMGF Magazine (Accepted for publication)

Award: Honorable Mention, GEMMeeting, September 2019

An evidence-based review evaluating the efficacy of oral magnesium supplementation for the management of pregnancy-related muscle cramps.


Seborrheic Dermatitis

Ana Silva

METIS Platform, September 2019 (Published online)

A clinical reference article on seborrheic dermatitis for the METIS medical knowledge platform.


Use of Melatonin in Migraine: What is the evidence?

Ana Silva

III Jornadas Camilo Castelo Branco, September 2019 — Poster Presentation

A poster reviewing the current evidence for the use of melatonin in migraine prevention and treatment.


My daughter seems to be in the moon — a case of Absence Crisis

Ana Silva

VII Jornadas Multidisciplinares do Aces Baixo Tâmega, June 2019 — Oral Communication

An oral case presentation describing a pediatric case of absence epilepsy, emphasizing clinical recognition and interdisciplinary management.


Obsessive compulsive disorder in adolescence — a family assessment

Ana Silva

VII Jornadas Multidisciplinares do Aces Baixo Tâmega, June 2019 — Oral Communication

Award: 3rd Award, VII Jornadas Multidisciplinares do Aces Baixo Tâmega

A family-centered case presentation on obsessive-compulsive disorder in an adolescent patient, exploring psychosocial dimensions and treatment approaches.


Suspected Sjogren’s Syndrome — the importance of a systemic and longitudinal view

Ana Silva

Jornadas Médicas Maia-Valongo, April 2019 — Oral Communication

A case report highlighting the diagnostic challenges of Sjögren's Syndrome and the importance of a systemic and longitudinal clinical approach in primary care.


Galactorrhea, how to manage? — The approach in primary health care

Ana Silva

23rd WONCA Europe Conference, May 2018 — Poster Presentation

A poster presented at the European General Practice conference outlining a primary care approach to the investigation and management of galactorrhea.


Acromegaly — A Case Report

Ana Silva

Medical Academy, June 2017 — Poster Presentation

A poster case report on acromegaly, reviewing clinical features, diagnosis, and management strategies.
